office_does: The prosecutor brings criminal cases, advises county government, and represents the county in civil matters.
race_blurb: Two attorneys differ most clearly on enforcement specificity and breadth of legal background.

candidates.summary: Attorney with prosecution, defense, civil, and pro-tem judging experience emphasizing fairness, accountability, and trust.
highlights: Has worked on prosecution and defense sides [S2]
Platform is principle-oriented with limited operational detail [S2]

safety.basis: Balances accountability with fair application and prosecution-defense experience.

experience.basis: Broad legal and pro-tem judicial experience, though no elected prosecutor tenure.

candidates.summary: Former special-assault prosecutor and current assistant city attorney emphasizing gangs, repeat violent offenders, victims, and law-enforcement coordination.
highlights: Prioritizes gang enforcement and repeat violent-offender prosecution [S2]
Calls for stronger victim services and law-enforcement coordination [S2]

safety.basis: Explicit enforcement-first agenda centered on gangs and repeat violent offenders.
